loops.summary: Revised flow with clear labels, prominent calls-to-action, and distinct button styles to address critique findings
changes: Added clear and distinct labels for each card
Emphasized primary call-to-action for each plan
Used clear and concise headings for each section of the cards
Added a comparison table to highlight plan differences
risks: Potential for information overload with additional features and explanations
Possible impact on user engagement with revised button styles

loops.summary: Revised flow incorporating critique findings for improved accessibility, clarity, and user experience
changes: Added clear and distinct labels for each card to facilitate navigation
Emphasized primary call-to-action for each plan to reduce friction
Used clear and concise headings for each section of the cards to improve clarity
Made button labels more descriptive to improve user understanding
Added a comparison table to highlight plan differences
Implemented ARIA attributes or other accessibility features for screen readers
Provided explicit and prominent call-to-action for the free plan
Considered separate and clear actions for each plan to reduce confusion
Used more detailed and explicit helper text to clarify the implications of each choice
risks: Potential for information overload with additional features and explanations
Possible impact on user engagement with revised button styles
